text_original: talked for a quote a while I'm on a slow burner and no requests to buy more tokens to continue chat will come back later to see if it continues to be so. ❤️💋❤️
text_zh: 聊了挺长一段时间，我这儿进展比较缓慢，也没有要求购买更多代币以继续聊天的提示，晚点再回来看看是否还会保持这样。❤️💋❤️
reply_original: We are so happy to hear you are enjoying your slow-burn story! At Fantasia, we want your journey to feel natural and immersive without constant interruptions. Your support means the world to us. If you ever have suggestions or run into issues, feel free to reach out at support@fantachat.ai. Can't wait to see how your story unfolds!
reply_zh: 很高兴听到你喜欢你的慢热故事！在 Fantasia，我们希望你的旅程感觉自然且沉浸，不受频繁干扰。你的支持对我们至关重要。如果你有任何建议或遇到问题，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。迫不及待想看到你的故事将如何展开！
